# SuperMegaCute

> Discovery platform for cute things: gifts, collectibles, home décor, desk
> accessories and aesthetic finds, matched by mood, aesthetic, recipient,
> occasion and budget.

The catalog is a structured product knowledge graph. Machine-readable data:

- /data/taxonomy.json — controlled vocabulary (pillars, facets, brands)
- /data/products.json — product records with facet metadata
- /data/collections.json — curated collections as saved graph queries
- /data/releases.json — collectibles release calendar

Explore URLs encode queries, e.g. /explore?aesthetics=kawaii&priceBand=under-25
(OR within a facet, AND across facets).
